creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 210007
racer.diff

Racer often needs to be updated when we update lang/rust since it's tied
to nightly features.  We have always just updated this port in the past
and will do so again when updating to Rust 1.40.0 [1].  Let's make it
official and assign the port to the Rust team.

[1] https://reviews.freebsd.org/D22843
